import bpy, math, json, os
from mathutils import Vector
scene=bpy.context.scene
objs=list(bpy.data.objects)
armatures=[o for o in objs if o.type=='ARMATURE']
weapons=[o for o in objs if any(s in o.name.lower() for s in ['aks','ak74','aks74','weapon','rifle','rfl'])]
RESULT={
 'file': bpy.data.filepath,
 'frame': scene.frame_current,
 'armatures': [o.name for o in armatures],
 'weapon_like': [{'name':o.name,'type':o.type,'hidden':o.hide_viewport,'matrix_world':[list(r) for r in o.matrix_world]} for o in weapons[:30]],
 'custom_props': {o.name:{k:o.get(k) for k in o.keys() if str(k).startswith('dayz_') or str(k).startswith('DAT_')} for o in armatures},
}
